recipe.title: Chef's Night Off
ingredients: rotisserie chicken you forgot you bought
cereal, maybe, if the chicken situation feels too intense
mystery yogurt with an acceptable expiration date
steps: Survey the kitchen like a game show contestant who was given no clues.
Find the easiest edible thing that requires the fewest decisions.
If rotisserie chicken is present, declare it the main character.
If not, assemble a highly curated plate of snack-adjacent objects.
Call the combination 'family-style grazing board' with a straight face.
Put everything on the table before anyone can ask what the actual plan was.
Celebrate the fact that no skillet was dirtied in the making of this meal.
